results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026 Global Economy Tested Again
10 Charts To Address Concerns On 2026 Geopolitical Conflict
Stock Market Outlook 2026: Political Risks Loom | Morgan Stanley
Equities hit records as geopolitical risks linger | IG International
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook and Reshapes Policy Priorities | IMF
Geopolitical market impacts and investment perspectives for 2026 | J.P. Morgan Private Bank

summary_extracted: Key flashpoints: Middle East conflict (energy price spike ~19%), US intervention in Venezuela, NATO posture in Greenland. IMF projects global growth 3.1%, inflation 4.4% for 2026. Trade fragmentation via tariffs, export controls. Despite risks, S&P 500 +4.5% and Nasdaq 100 +6.2% to ATH. JPMorgan Dimon warns of complex risk environment.
